features: 【Full Coverage, Matte Finish】Delivers intense white pigment with flawless full coverage to mask blemishes, even out skin tone, and create a smooth, shine-free canvas—ideal for bold character makeup.
【Waterproof & Long-Lasting】Sweat-proof and smudge-resistant formula stays put for hours, perfect for parties, performances, and all-day cosplay events without caking or cracking.
【Lightweight, Skin-Friendly Formula】Crafted with gentle ingredients suitable for all skin types, offering breathable comfort without the heavy feel of grease paint or traditional SFX makeup.
【Versatile for SFX & Everyday Artistry】Great for Halloween, gothic makeup, stage performance, mime, costume parties, and film shoots—transform into skeletons, clowns, vampires, or Jokers with ease.
【Airless Pump Bottle】Packaged in a hygienic vacuum pump; simply press several times to release the product—clean, travel-friendly, and easy to control.
description: Product Description How do I apply the white liquid foundation evenly? Start with clean, moisturized skin. Use a sponge, brush, or fingers to dot the foundation over your face, then blend outward in thin layers. Let each layer dry before adding more if you want a stronger white base. Can I mix it with other foundations or pigments? Yes! You can mix it with foundation to lighten your base or with color pigments for custom Halloween shades. How do I set it so it doesn’t smear or transfer? After it dries, use a setting powder or translucent loose powder to lock it in place. For extra staying power, finish with a setting spray. Is it waterproof or sweat-resistant? Yes, it holds up well for parties and trick-or-treating. How do I remove it at the end of the day? Use a cleansing oil. Gently massage onto skin to break down the product, then rinse with warm water and follow with a facial cleanser.

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: Use a sponge or brush to apply evenly, and set with powder or setting spray for maximum wear.
specifications_table.Benefits: Full Coverage, Longwear, Matte Flawless Finish, Waterproof
